title: selaginella moellendorffii
intro: Selaginella moellendorffii, also known as Spiked Moses or Resurrection Fern, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant species belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella moellendorffii include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to enhance immune function and protect against certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in the production of supplements and cosmetics.
